controls.title: Data Encryption
controls.description: All sensitive data must be encrypted at rest and in transit using strong, state-of-the-art encryption algorithms.
controls.implementation_guidance: Use minimum AES-256 for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit.

controls.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
controls.description: MFA must be enforced for all administrative and remote access to the organization's information systems.
